subject: [CPS] Add roles-wrapper dependency
commit_message:
[CPS] Add roles-wrapper dependency

RBAC roles are created when deploying cps chart.

Issue-ID: CPS-862
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Icf91bf3271027e86ed439740bb9d9465ded3eee9
(cherry picked from commit 1659fa68624e7eb53b6d2c8f36a453d28275c9a4)
